subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the signs of God! Glorify the Ever-Living, the Self-Subsisting One, Who hath caused the light of guidance to dawn from the Kingdom of Glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای موقن بایات الله حمد کن حی قیومی را که بنور هدی که مشرق گشت از ملکوت ابهی
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
